claim: UNODC's April 2025 Inflection Point report estimates Southeast-Asian scam centres generate just under US$40 billion in annual profits and that close to 7,000 workers from over 50 countries were freed in a Myanmar crackdown.
quote: hundreds of industrial-scale scam centres generating just under US $40 billion in annual profits, according to latest UNODC estimates ... close to 7,000 workers from more than 50 countries were freed from crime syndicates

claim: UN reporting documents torture, rape and forced labor inside multi-billion-dollar Southeast-Asian scam centres staffed by trafficked workers from more than 50 countries.
quote: UN report exposes torture, rape in Southeast Asia's multi-billion-dollar scam centres

claim: INTERPOL's largest-ever 2024 anti-trafficking-fuelled-fraud operation across 116 countries arrested over 2,500 people linked to scam compounds running romance, investment and crypto fraud.
quote: INTERPOL's largest-ever global operation targeting trafficking-fuelled fraud across 116 countries and territories led to the arrest of over 2,500 individuals ... voice phishing, romance scams, investment fraud and cryptocurrency scams

claim: INTERPOL launched Operation Shadow Storm in 2026, a UK-Home-Office-funded task force to dismantle scam centres, citing crypto flows linked to compounds exceeding $11 billion.
quote: INTERPOL launches Operation Shadow Storm to fight scam centres ... Crypto flows linked to scam compounds exceed $11 billion

claim: Chainalysis found pig-butchering crypto revenue grew ~40% YoY in 2024 with deposits up ~210%, while AI service vendors on the Huione marketplace showed a 1,900% compound annual growth rate from 2021-2024.
quote: pig butchering revenue grew nearly 40% year over year, with the number of deposits to pig butchering scams growing nearly 210% ... AI service vendors seeing a staggering 1,900% compound annual growth rate from 2021-2024

claim: Chainalysis estimated 2024 crypto scams at $9.9 billion likely revising up to $12.4 billion as more scam wallets get identified.
quote: cryptocurrency scams amounted to $9.9 billion in 2024, with that figure likely to be revised higher. It predicts 2024's figure to grow to a record of $12.4 billion

claim: Chainalysis 2025 figures show crypto scam revenue reached at least $14 billion on-chain, potentially exceeding $17 billion as more wallets are identified, with AI tools amplifying losses.
quote: Crypto scams and fraud took in at least $14 billion on-chain in 2025, up from a revised total of $12 billion the previous year, and the 2025 figure could exceed $17 billion

claim: Chinese actor Wang Xing was lured to Mae Sot on a fake film audition on 3 January 2025, kidnapped into Myawaddy, and rescued on 7 January after Thai authorities responded to his family's report.
quote: Wang Xing went missing on January 3, 2025, in Mae Sot, lured by cyber scam operators under the false pretense of a film audition, and was kidnapped and transported to a scam compound across the Myanmar border in Myawaddy

claim: After the Wang Xing case, Thailand cut electricity, internet and fuel to Myawaddy scam hubs on 5 February 2025, and Myanmar repatriated 261 victims and detained 1,303 foreign nationals between 12-17 February 2025.
quote: February 5: Thailand cut electricity, internet, and fuel to scam hubs in Myawaddy. February 12-17: Myanmar repatriated 261 trafficked victims, and authorities detained 1,303 foreign nationals

claim: In November 2025, OFAC sanctioned Burma's DKBA militia and the Trans Asia/Troth Star/Chamu Sawang network linked to the KK Park and Huanya scam compounds in Myawaddy, citing $10 billion in 2024 American losses to SE Asia scams (66% YoY).
quote: Trans Asia has entered into land lease contracts with other entities—including the OFAC-designated KNA and Troth Star—to develop other scam compounds, including the Huanya compound and the notorious KK Park compound ... Americans lost at least $10 billion in 2024 ... a 66 percent increase

claim: In May 2025, OFAC designated the Karen National Army militia, leader Saw Chit Thu, and his sons as a transnational criminal organization for facilitating cyber scams, human trafficking and smuggling in Burma.
quote: OFAC sanctioned the Karen National Army (KNA), a militia group in Burma, as a transnational criminal organization, along with the group's leader Saw Chit Thu, and his two sons

claim: NCMEC's 2025 CyberTipline received 21.3 million reports and 1.4 million online-enticement reports (a 156% jump from 2024), plus over 1.5 million reports linked to generative AI and child exploitation.
quote: the CyberTipline received 21.3 million reports ... 1.4 million reports of online enticement in 2025, a 156% increase from 2024 ... more than 1.5 million CyberTipline reports indicating a nexus to GAI

claim: NCMEC has tracked at least 36 teenage boys who died by suicide since 2021 after sextortion victimization, including a 17-year-old whose extortion lasted 19.5 hours and 400 messages.
quote: since 2021, NCMEC is aware of at least 36 teenage boys who have taken their lives because they were victimized by sextortion ... the online exploitation lasted 19½ hours and involved 400 messages

claim: Two Nigerian brothers, Samuel and Sampson Ogoshi, were sentenced to 17.5 years for the sextortion of Marquette teen Jordan DeMay, who killed himself within hours after being demanded $1,000 (he could only send $300).
quote: Two Nigerian men were sentenced 210 months each (17.5 years) ... The person on the other end demanded DeMay send $1,000 ... But DeMay could only come up with $300. Hours later, he died by suicide

claim: In 2025 deepfake fraud in the US jumped 700% in Q1 and global deepfake-related losses topped $200 million in Q1 alone, with scammers running real-time face-swap and AI voice on Zoom/WhatsApp video calls.
quote: Deepfake fraud in the U.S. skyrocketed by 700% in the first few months of 2025. Deepfake fraud globally caused more than $200 million in financial losses in just the first quarter of 2025

claim: Haotian, a face-swapping AI app behind 2025 romance scams, lets users tune up to 50 facial settings to mimic a target's appearance and was monetised largely through crypto payments.
quote: Haotian, a face-swapping AI app, has been implicated in romance scams ... Users can customize an extensive range of facial features—up to 50 different settings

claim: The 2024 US TIP Report kept Cambodia and Burma on Tier 3, citing tens of thousands of forced-labor victims in scam compounds, senior officials profiting from the operations, and ~220,000 trafficked into the syndicates per a 2023 UN figure.
quote: exploitation of tens of thousands of victims in forced criminality in online scam operations in Cambodia ... Some senior government officials and advisors owned properties and facilities known to be utilized by online scam operators

claim: FBI IC3 reported 2024 elder-fraud losses of $4.8 billion across 147,000+ victims aged 60+, a 43% YoY increase, with confidence/romance scams alone costing seniors nearly $400 million.
quote: over 147,000 victims over the age of 60 reported losses of $4.8 billion ... 43 percent increase ... Confidence/Romance scams resulted in almost $400 million in elderly losses

claim: The FBI has warned that AI deepfakes and 'nudify' apps are powering a 322% spike in sextortion cases (Feb 2022-Feb 2023), with male victims aged 14-17 most targeted and an alarming linked suicide count.
quote: horrific increase in sextortion cases targeting US minors, with victims typically males between the ages of 14 and 17 ... sextortion cases, which have increased 322%

claim: In October 2025 US prosecutors seized $15 billion in crypto from pig-butchering operations tied to Cambodian forced-labor camps run by Chen Zhi's network, dwarfing the prior $225 million record seizure.
quote: Feds seize $15 billion in crypto from 'pig butchering' ... Chen and others allegedly operated at least 10 forced labor camps across Cambodia
